steps.title: Fastest path: organize the angle facts first
steps.content: Use the given angle relationships first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are organized.

steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The three angles of the triangle sum to 180°: $$38 + 90 + \frac{k}{2} = 180$$
